reviews.text: I have been using the NimbusBook Edge 16 during long sessions. It feels bulky at around 2.5 kg. It heats up quickly and reaches about 49°C. Noise levels are manageable most of the time. In the end, it works fine for my needs.

I have been using the NimbusBook Edge 16 for coding and browsing. The display is sharp with good colors. There is some flex in the chassis. Fan noise stays around 30 dB and is barely noticeable. Performance is decent but not exceptional at around 78 fps. Overall, it's a decent machine for the price.
